UtHx]{{middot}}[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:User_talk:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}?action=edit UtE]){{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

admin]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}} logs] | [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:User:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}?action=history&limit=5 UHx]{{middot}}{{AfD count link|{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}|linklabel=AfD}}{{int:dot-separator}}[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:User_talk:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}?action=history&limit=5 UtHx]{{middot}}[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:User_talk:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}?action=edit UtE]){{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: '''[[User:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|{{{User|{{{1|''Example''}}}}}}]]''' ([[User talk:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/wiki.phtml?title=User_talk:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}&action=edit§ion=new message]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[[Special:CentralAuth/{{{1|newname}}}|global contribs]]{{middot}}[[Special:DeletedContributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|deleted page moves]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log/newusers|user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} user creation]{{middot}}[[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|block user]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log]{{middot}}[https://xtools.wmcloud.org/ec?user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}&project=en.wikipedia count]{{middot}}[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=users&usprop=editcount&format=xml&ususers={{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}} total]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}} logs]{{middot}}[https://xtools.wmflabs.org/editsummary/en.wikipedia.org/{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|PATH}} summary]{{middot}}[[Special:Emailuser/{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|email]] | [{{fullurl:Special:Listusers|limit=1&username={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} lu]{{middot}}{{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for adminship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for adminship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfas]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for adminship#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfa]]}}{{middot}}{{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for bureaucratship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for bureaucratship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfb]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for bureaucratship#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfb]]}}{{#if:{{{ban|}}}| [[{{SITENAME}}:List of banned arbitration/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|arb]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for arbitration#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|arb]]}}{{middot}}{{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for
